queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how maintaining critical accounts or multiple existing credits functions as a credit risk driver that reduces default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account status and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan purposes designated for the purchase of consumer electronics, such as radios or televisions, on credit default probability.
